chunks.text: 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 03 of 2026 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For Order on CMA No. 172/26 (U/O 110) 2. For Order on CMA No. 173/26 (U/o 23 Rule 3 CPC) 3. For order on CMA No. 88/26 (Contempt) 4. For hearing of CMA No. 45/26 (U/O 39 Rule 1 & 2) 5. For hearing of main petition. 06.03.2026 Mr. Talha Javed, Advocate alongwith Mr. Abdul Munam, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Amin Bandukdha, Advocate alongwith Mr. Sunder Lal, Advocate for Respondents.......... 1. Granted. 2-5. Learned counsel for the parties submit that the matter has been settled as per terms of Settlement Agreement attached to CMA No. 173/2026. Accordingly instant application is allowed and matter is disposed of in terms of the Settlement Agreement arrived at between the parties. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. J U D G E Ayaz
